title: World's 100 Best Coffee Shops 2026
description: Annual ranking of the world's top specialty coffee shops, judged by an international panel of industry voters.

title: Good Food Awards: Coffee 2026
description: US-focused award recognizing roasters that combine outstanding taste with environmental and social responsibility.

title: SCA World Barista Championship
description: Annual world championship for baristas. Past competitors and coaches are a reliable quality signal.

title: Coffee Review 95+ Scores
description: Coffee Review scores 95 and above signal exceptional roasting quality.

title: Sprudgie Awards
description: Annual specialty coffee community awards covering shops, roasters, and people.
